name: Festove Irish Cream Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine graham cracker curls, sugar and margarine; press into bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
2. In a bowl, soften gelatin in water until dissolved. Stir over low heat until sugar and beaten egg yolks are blended. Cook for 3 minutes stirring constantly over low heat.
3. In another bowl, blend cream cheese and cocoa at medium speed on an electric mixer until well combined. Gradually add the gelatin mixture and bourbon, mixing until well combined.
4. Chill the cheesecake batter until thickened but not set.
5. Beat egg whites with a small amount of sugar until foamy; gradually add remaining sugar beating until stiff peaks form. Gently fold the beaten egg whites and whipped cream into the cheese batter and pour over crust.
6. Refrigerate until firm. Garnish with chocolate curls and small silver candy balls, if desired.
VARIATION:
Substitute 2 tablespoons cold coffee for bourbon.
